sources.title: Parapsycho. Spektrum Der Angst 1975 Marisa Mell, Mascha Gonska, Mathieu Carrière, Peter Neusser, Alexandra Drewes, Debra Berger, Jane Tilden
sources.description: Austrian Horror film staring Marisa Mell, Leon Askin, Debra Berger. Not a lot of dialogue but I have not had a lot of luck with the English Subtitles. Looks like a video transfer, so fairly low res.

metadata.Plot: Man kills his lovers using his psychic powers.
metadata.Writer: Peter Patzak, Georg M. Reuther, Géza von Radványi
metadata.Actors: Marisa Mell, Peter Neusser, Leon Askin
